programme.title: Entertainment Tonight
programme.desc: News and features about performers, productions and the milieu.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: Castaways find themselves on both a literal and figurative island after their return from what is regarded as one of the "craziest tribals of all time"; castaways reflect on their letters from home; a shocking incident at an immunity challenge.

programme.desc: The final four chefs race to make it to the finale in a challenge highlighting the five flavor profiles.

programme.desc: The headlines one needs to know overnight... plus, a roundup of MoneyWatch, health, consumer and up-to-the-minute technology news, the latest weather, and inspiring stories of kindness and hope.

programme.desc: CBS News Mornings broadcasts on weekdays and offers viewers up-to-date news, comprehensive weather forecasts, and highlights from the world of sports.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Single Mom ... Married Boyfriend!; Cheating on Facebook?
programme.desc: A single mother says she lent thousands of dollars to a man who says they were never intimate; a woman's cheating boyfriend accuses her of stealing his property.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Twin Girls Repoed Ride!; Mangled Motorcycle Mix-Up!; Ex-Fiance Crash!
programme.desc: A man co-signs a loan for his grandchildren's father, and his favor is returned with nonpayment and a repo; a friend totals an imprisoned man's motorcycle and is seriously injured; a woman sues her ex-fiance for crashing her car and injuring her.

programme.desc: When an emotion-driven decision puts Woodstone at risk, Sam and Jay step up to defend what they've built; Isaac struggles to adjust to new surroundings, only to realize that some connections are too important to leave behind.

programme.desc: When an ambitious filmmaker dies in a suspicious cleaning accident, Elsbeth focuses on the subject of her final documentary.

programme.sub-title: Beloved Car Trashed by Ex!; Tire Kicking or Car Whipping?
programme.desc: Ending a rocky relationship, a woman is accused of throwing things at her ex's vehicle; a man denies vandalizing a co-worker's car.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Ungrateful Aunt's Trailer Trash?; Lesbian Love Gone Wrong
programme.desc: After her niece lets her live in her home rent-free for many years, an aunt sues her for destroying an old mobile home; a woman demands the return of an engagement ring, but her ex says it was a gift.

programme.title: Sheriff Country
programme.desc: A dramatic federal crackdown rocks Edgewater and forces Sheriff Mickey Fox to confront a sprawling investigation that pits loyalty to her community against the reach of the DEA.

programme.title: Fire Country
programme.desc: When Bode's past resurfaces far from Edgewater, a volatile chain of events leads to a perilous off-duty rescue that forces him to confront guilt, accountability and what it truly means to step up when lives -- and friendships -- are on the line.
